transcriptDetails.userPrompt: list all the students and their departments
transcriptDetails.explanation: This query retrieves a list of student IDs along with their first and last names from the student database. There are no filters or conditions applied, so it includes all students in the database. The results are not specifically ordered or grouped. The purpose of this query is likely to provide a complete list of students, which could be used for general record-keeping or administrative purposes.
transcriptDetails.llmResponse:
SELECT s.student_id, s.first_name, s.last_name
FROM Students s;

transcriptDetails.userPrompt: list all the products which is heavier than 1 kg
transcriptDetails.explanation: This query retrieves data from the 'products', 'productattributevalues', 'attributes' table(s), applying filter conditions.
transcriptDetails.llmResponse:
SELECT p.productid, p.name, p.description, p.price, p.stockqty, p.sku
FROM products p
JOIN productattributevalues pav ON p.productid = pav.productid
JOIN attributes a ON pav.attributeid = a.attributeid
WHERE a.name ILIKE 'Weight' AND CAST(pav.valuedecimal AS numeric) > 1 AND a.unit ILIKE 'kg';

JOIN attributes a ON pav.attributeid = a.attributeid

transcriptDetails.remarks: The selected database schema does not contain tables or columns matching your question. Please rephrase or check available tables.

transcriptDetails.userPrompt: list all the student name and the courses they have enrolled
transcriptDetails.explanation: This query retrieves the first and last names of students along with the IDs of the courses they are enrolled in. It combines information from three different tables: Students, Enrollments, and Classes, by matching student and class identifiers. There are no specific filters or conditions applied, and the results are not ordered or grouped in any particular way. The purpose of this query is likely to provide a list of students and the courses they are taking, which could be useful for administrative or reporting purposes in an educational setting.
transcriptDetails.llmResponse:
SELECT 
    s.first_name, 
    s.last_name, 
    c.course_id
FROM 
    Students s
JOIN 
    Enrollments e ON s.student_id = e.student_id
JOIN 
    Classes c ON e.class_id = c.class_id;
